channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Apple Readies Photo-Editing Overhaul With New AI Tools in iOS 27 - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Denuvo Responds to Day-Zero DRM Hypervisor Crack: "We're Already Working on Updated Security Versions" - TechPowerUp
item.description:

item.title: The sequel to the iconic emulator ZSNES is called Super ZSNES, of course - Engadget
item.description:
1. The sequel to the iconic emulator ZSNES is called Super ZSNES, of course  Engadget
  2. One of the most iconic emulators ever is back from the dead with impressive new features  XDA
  3. "Super ZSNES" is a stab at a modern SNES emulator from the original developers  Ars Technica
  4. Legendary ZSNES Nintendo emulator rewritten from scratch with GPU-acceleration, no vibe coding — new Super ZSNES has ‘far more accurate CPU and audio cores than the original’  Tom's Hardware
  5. An All-Time Classic SNES Emulator Returns With Plans To Change Everything  Kotaku

item.title: Final Fantasy XIV Director Naoki Yoshida Discusses the Next Decade - Anime News Network
item.description:
1. Final Fantasy XIV Director Naoki Yoshida Discusses the Next Decade  Anime News Network
  2. Final Fantasy 14 Is Coming To Switch 2, But With An Annoying Caveat  GameSpot
  3. SQUARE ENIX ANNOUNCES EVERCOLD— LATEST FINAL FANTASY XIV EXPANSION SET FOR JANUARY 2027  Square Enix press site
  4. Final Fantasy XIV Is Coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in August With a Separate Subscription  IGN
  5. FF14 on Switch 2 has some framerate issues, but "you don't have to be concerned," says Yoshi-P  Radio Times

item.title: Look at All These New Google Logos, Gmail and Calendar Included - Droid Life
item.description:
1. Look at All These New Google Logos, Gmail and Calendar Included  Droid Life
  2. Google's new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and other apps are radical redesigns  9to5Google
  3. Google's Redesigned App Icons Leak: First Look at New Gmail, Drive, More  PCMag
  4. Google’s new gradient icon design is coming to more apps  The Verge
  5. Google is redesigning its app icons to fix a big problem  Android Police

item.title: The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show - Kotaku
item.description:
1. The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show  Kotaku
  2. We went hands-on with 'The Expanse: Osiris Reborn', and it's a hard sci-fi 'Mass Effect' successor with show-stealing zero-G sections  Space
  3. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn plays like a Mass Effect-like sci-fi adventure in fine form, but its developer's use of AI raises some difficult questions  Eurogamer.net
  4. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn PS5 Hands-On Preview - Massive Mass Effect Vibes In The Best Way Possible  PlayStation Universe
  5. Do You Need to Watch The Expanse Before Osiris Reborn Comes Out?  GameRant
